description: Site header with logo, primary navigation menu, and hamburger toggle on mobile. Reads a registered WP nav menu by theme location.

location.description: WP theme location slug for the nav menu.

logo_text.description: Logo text. Falls back to pp_site_title() when empty. Ignored when logo_url is set.

logo_url.description: Logo image URL. When set, renders an img tag instead of text. Falls back to logo_text if empty.

logo_alt.description: Alt text for the logo image. Defaults to logo_text if empty.
